metadata.title: ContextBuildRequest — single entrypoint for all context assembly

description: Canonical request for building a context packet (src/shared/infrastructure/context/models.py). This is the single entrypoint for all context assembly inside CORE — declares the operational goal, invocation trigger, evaluation phase, and optional targeting hints. Consumed by ContextPacket as its request field. TriggerType (cli/workflow/agent) and PhaseType (parse/load/audit/runtime/execution) are Literal type aliases in the same file — not classes, not governable via AST gate. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 Session 4.

goal.description: Human-readable operational goal for the context assembly.

trigger.description: Invocation trigger. Governed vocabulary: TriggerType Literal — cli, workflow, agent.

phase.description: Evaluation phase. Governed vocabulary: PhaseType Literal — parse, load, audit, runtime, execution.

workflow_id.description: Optional workflow identifier (str | None). Present when trigger is workflow.

stage_id.description: Optional stage identifier within the workflow (str | None).

target_files.description: Repo-relative file paths to target context assembly toward. Default empty list.

target_symbols.description: Qualified symbol names to target context assembly toward. Default empty list.

target_paths.description: Directory paths to target context assembly toward. Default empty list.

include_constitution.description: Whether to include constitutional rules in the context packet. Default True.

include_policy.description: Whether to include policy rules in the context packet. Default True.

include_symbols.description: Whether to include symbol-level context. Default True.

include_vectors.description: Whether to include vector similarity results. Default True.

include_runtime.description: Whether to include runtime state context. Default True.
